aiAssistant.name: SUNAY 's Assistant
aiAssistant.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm SUNAY 's portfolio AI. Ask me about his skills, projects, experience, or how to get in touch!
aiAssistant.systemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant for SUNAY developer portfolio. Answer questions about his skills (React, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, etc.), projects (NexusChat, CloudCanvas, DataPulse, AutoDeploy), experience (Google, Stripe, Vercel internships), education (Stanford CS), and how to contact him (alex@portfolio.dev). Be friendly, concise, and professional. If asked something unrelated, politely redirect to portfolio topics.
aiAssistant.placeholder: Ask about my skills, projects, or experience…
aiAssistant.fallbackResponse: I'm SUNAY 's portfolio assistant! I can tell you about his skills, projects, experience, and how to get in touch. What would you like to know?

hero.greeting: Hi there 👋 Welcome to my Portfolio
hero.name: SUNAY
hero.title: Full Stack Developer & UI/UX Designer
hero.description: I craft pixel-perfect web applications that blend elegant design with robust engineering. 3+ years turning complex problems into beautiful, scalable solutions.

about.title: The Story Behind the Code
about.subtitle: Behind the Code
about.description:
I'm SUNAY 'sba passionate Full Stack Developer based in San Francisco. I specialize in building modern web applications using React, Node.js, and cloud technologies.

With a background in both design and engineering, I bring a unique perspective to every project — creating experiences that are not just functional, but genuinely delightful to use.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open source, writing about web development, or exploring the latest AI tools.
funFacts: 🎯 95% test coverage on all my projects

education.institution: siiddharth instute of engineering and technology
education.description: Specialized in Human-Computer Interaction and Distributed Systems. Senior thesis on real-time collaborative editing using CRDTs.
Professional-level certification covering cloud architecture, cost optimization, and security best practices.

projects.title: NexusChat
projects.description: Real-time collaborative chat platform with AI-powered message summaries, thread management, and end-to-end encryption. Serving 50k+ active users.

projects.title: CloudCanvas
projects.description: Browser-based collaborative design tool with real-time cursors, vector editing, and one-click export to Figma/Sketch formats.

projects.title: DataPulse
projects.description: Analytics dashboard with ML-powered anomaly detection. Integrates with 40+ data sources and provides predictive insights in real time.

projects.title: AutoDeploy
projects.description: CI/CD orchestration platform that automates deployment pipelines, manages rollbacks, and provides cost-optimized cluster scaling.

internships.description: Worked on Google Maps' real-time traffic prediction system using ML models. Improved prediction accuracy by 18% on highway segments.
internships.mentorNote: Alex showed exceptional initiative — best intern project in the Maps team this quarter.

internships.description: Built components for Stripe's payment dashboard. Redesigned the transaction history UI, reducing support tickets by 23%.
internships.mentorNote: One of the most thorough and detail-oriented interns I've mentored in 5 years.

internships.description: Started as an open-source contributor to Next.js, then joined as an intern. Contributed to the App Router architecture and edge runtime optimizations.
internships.mentorNote: Alex's open source contributions speak for themselves — quality is consistently exceptional.

certificates.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
certificates.description: Advanced cloud architecture certification covering multi-region designs, disaster recovery, and cost optimization strategies.

certificates.title: Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer
certificates.description: Expertise in building data processing systems, ML pipelines, and real-time analytics on Google Cloud Platform.

certificates.title: Meta Frontend Developer Professional
certificates.description: Comprehensive React and modern web development certification covering advanced patterns, testing, and accessibility.

certificates.title: Certified Kubernetes Administrator
certificates.description: Hands-on Kubernetes administration including cluster setup, networking, storage, security, and troubleshooting.
